name: CELYAD ONCOLOGY S.A.
summary: Celyad Oncology SA is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery and development of CAR-T cell therapies for cancer. The company's pipeline includes autologous and allogeneic CAR-T candidates targeting various solid tumors and hematological malignancies. Celyad Oncology is headquartered in Mont-Saint-Guibert, Belgium.
